title: Dunkel: malt leads
summary: Dunkel shows how dark color can mean smooth malt, not heavy sweetness.

signals.title: Malt
signals.body: Bread crust, toast, and light caramel carry the style.

signals.title: Balance
signals.body: Bitterness stays low so malt remains the focus.

signals.title: Body
signals.body: It is fuller than Helles but still drinkable.

signals.title: Food
signals.body: Roast pork, mushrooms, and brown bread make sense.
